# This is a big header

<!-- This is a comment. Below, you'll see code for inserting an image. To make this image appear, update <custom-path>. To add an image, save it inside the imgs folder of this repository. -->
The image paths won't work as written. They combine filenames with a path that doesn't match. Use this instead:

```html

<img src="Aaron_zhu_ex09/static/imgs/barchart.png" alt="Bar Chart. "  width="500"/>
<img src="Aaron_zhu_ex09/static/imgs/violinchart.png" alt="Bar Chart. "  width="500"/>
<img src="Aaron_zhu_ex09/static/imgs/boxchart.png" alt="Bar Chart. "  width="500"/>

```
